description: Validate enforcement on current system, generate receipt

instructions.intent: Run the full enforcement suite against the current roadmap system. Validate that all enforcement gates work correctly on the active DAG (dispatch-system-001). Generate a receipt documenting: test results, enforcement coverage, any violations detected, recommendations for hardening.
acceptance_criteria: JSON structure: { timestamp, dagId, results, coverage, violations, recommendations }
All enforcement tests pass (npm run test -- tests/enforce-audit.test.ts)
Enforcement coverage report: % of batches covered, % of nodes validated
Any violations flagged with severity and remediation guidance
